name: Jordan Lee
title: Senior Product Manager
summary: Product leader with 10+ years building B2B SaaS platforms. Track record of shipping revenue-driving features, scaling cross-functional teams, and improving retention through data-informed roadmaps.

bullets: Led document automation initiative that increased enterprise ARR by 24%.
Reduced time-to-value from 45 to 18 days by redesigning onboarding.
Managed roadmap for a team of 3 PMs and 18 engineers.
Launched reporting suite used by 2,400+ customers.
Partnered with sales to close $3.2M in expansion revenue.
